Home / Services / Painting Services

Painting Services

Refresh your Jacksonville home with our professional interior and exterior painting services.

Dreams Renovation Remodeling provides professional painting services for Jacksonville homeowners. Whether you're looking to refresh the interior of your home or protect the exterior from the elements, we have the expertise and experience to get the job done right. We use high-quality paints and proven techniques to ensure a beautiful and long-lasting finish.

We understand the importance of proper preparation, which is why we take the time to thoroughly clean and prepare all surfaces before painting. We also offer color consultation services to help you choose the perfect colors for your home.

Our painting services include interior painting, exterior painting, cabinet painting, and drywall repair. We're committed to providing excellent customer service and ensuring your complete satisfaction. Let Dreams Renovation Remodeling transform your home with a fresh coat of paint.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Consultation and Color Selection – Choose the perfect colors for your home.
  2. 02 Step 2: Preparation – Clean and prepare all surfaces for painting.
  3. 03 Step 3: Painting – Apply high-quality paint with precision and care.
  4. 04 Step 4: Clean Up – Clean up the job site and leave it spotless.

Benefits

  • Enhanced Aesthetics
  • Increased Home Value
  • Protection from the Elements
  • Improved Air Quality

Frequently Asked Questions

How often should I repaint my home's exterior?

It depends on the climate and the type of paint, but most homes should be repainted every 5-10 years.

What type of paint is best for a bathroom?

A moisture-resistant paint with a satin or semi-gloss finish is best for bathrooms.

Do you offer a warranty on your painting services?

Yes, we offer a warranty on our painting services to ensure your complete satisfaction.

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with painting services? Contact us today.
